description: A market_info web_search and a listing disagree on the average rent figure for the same area; a correct answer surfaces the discrepancy instead of silently picking one.

data.results:
### Web Search: average rent Shoreditch studio
Source A (Zoopla market page): average studio rent in Shoreditch is about £1,650 pcm.
Source B (a letting-agent blog): claims the Shoreditch studio average is £2,300 pcm.
